# Test Fixtures

## problematic.funscript
A funscript that demonstrates common problems: abrupt position changes, missing sections, inconsistent pacing, extreme values, flat sections.

## clean.funscript  
The result of applying FunScriptForge recommendations to problematic.funscript. Used as the baseline clean input for estim processing.

## Usage
These are the reference inputs for:
- Integration tests (sensitivity matrix)
- eTransform validation
- Before/after comparison baselines
